exam_name: Administering Relational Databases on Microsoft Azure
exam_price_notes: Price not specified in the document.

testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: Database administrator who manages cloud and on-premises databases built with Azure SQL services and SQL Server.
recommended_experience: Experience with Azure SQL Database, Azure SQL Managed Instance, SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines (Windows and Linux), and SQL Server on-premises.

prerequisites.description: Experience with building database solutions that support multiple workloads built with Azure SQL services and SQL Server.

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

domains.name: Plan and implement data platform resources

objectives.title: Plan and deploy Azure SQL solutions
sub_objectives: Recommend a database offering based on specific requirements
Identify use cases for Azure Arc-enabled SQL services
Identify use cases for Azure SQL Database in Microsoft Fabric
Deploy database offerings on selected platforms
Apply patches and updates for hybrid and infrastructure as a service (IaaS) deployment
Configure resources for scale and performance
Configure Azure SQL Database for scale and performance
Configure Azure SQL Managed Instance for scale and performance
Configure SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines for scale and performance

objectives.title: Plan and implement a migration strategy
sub_objectives: Evaluate offline or online migration strategies
Implement a migration between Azure SQL services
Implement Azure SQL Managed Instance database copy and move

objectives.title: Configure database authentication and authorization
sub_objectives: Configure Microsoft Entra ID authentication for Azure SQL Database, Azure SQL Managed Instance, and SQL Server
Configure authentication for SQL on Azure VMs and Azure SQL Managed Instance
Create users from Microsoft Entra identities
Configure database and object-level permissions using graphical tools
Apply the principle of least privilege for all securables
Manage authentication and authorization by using T-SQL

objectives.title: Implement security for data at rest and data in transit
sub_objectives: Configure server- and database-level firewall rules
Implement Always Encrypted with VBS enclaves
Configure private links and service endpoints
Implement compliance controls for sensitive data

domains.name: Monitor, configure, and optimize database resources

objectives.title: Monitor resource activity and performance
sub_objectives: Configure and monitor activity and performance
Identify performance issues using dynamic management views (DMVs)
Identify and implement index changes for queries
Recommend query construct modifications based on resource usage

objectives.title: Configure database solutions for optimal performance
sub_objectives: Configure compute and storage resources for scaling
Identify use cases for intelligent query processing (IQP) features

domains.name: Configure and manage automation of tasks

objectives.title: Create and manage SQL Server Agent jobs
sub_objectives: Manage schedules for regular maintenance jobs

objectives.title: Automate deployment of database resources
sub_objectives: Automate deployment by using Azure Resource Manager (ARM) and Bicep templates
Automate deployment by using Azure PowerShell
Automate deployment by using Azure CLI

objectives.title: Create and manage database tasks in Azure
sub_objectives: Create and configure database tasks by using automation
Configure alerts and notifications on database tasks

domains.name: Plan and configure a high availability and disaster recovery (HA/DR) environment

objectives.title: Plan an HA/DR strategy for database solutions
sub_objectives: Recommend HA/DR strategy based on Recovery Point Objective/Recovery Time Objective (RPO/RTO) requirements
Plan a testing procedure for an HA/DR solution
Plan and perform backup and restore of a database
Recommend a database backup and restore strategy
Perform a database backup by using native tools
Perform a database restore by using native tools
Perform a database restore to a point in time
Backup and restore a database by using T-SQL
Backup to and restore from cloud storage

objectives.title: Configure HA/DR for database solutions
sub_objectives: Configure Always On availability groups on SQL Managed Instance and Azure virtual machines
Configure Always On Failover Cluster Instances on Azure virtual machines

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Learn (free self-paced training)
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning paths mapped to each exam

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Official Practice Assessment
official_study_resources.notes: Free official practice questions on Microsoft Learn

aliases: administering relational databases on microsoft azure
